items.title: EdgeOS Router Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
items.description: EdgeOS routers contain an unauthenticated remote code execution vulnerability in the management interface.

priority.reason: Listed in CISA's Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog. Associated with known ransomware campaign use. CVSS v3 base score: 9.8.

query_guidance.tanium_pattern: Target by installed application name/version matching the affected product, combined with an OS platform filter. For appliances/firmware, target by device banner or management-interface fingerprint if your sensor supports it.
query_guidance.rapid7_pattern: Filter scan results by CVE ID or the vendor advisory's associated Rapid7 vulnerability check ID; confirm exposure on the specific service port called out in the advisory.

items.title: Apache HTTP Server Privilege Escalation
items.description: A local privilege escalation vulnerability exists in Apache HTTP Server.

priority.reason: Listed in CISA's Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog. CVSS v3 base score: 9.8.

query_guidance.tanium_pattern: Target by installed application/kernel/package version. Combine with a check for local user accounts or service accounts, since impact depends on existing local access.
query_guidance.rapid7_pattern: Use a credentialed scan; privilege-escalation checks are typically far less reliable (or entirely unavailable) via unauthenticated scanning.
